nasb.text: Yet if only one is blown, then the leaders, the heads of the divisions of Israel, shall assemble before you.

esv.text: But if they blow only one, then the chiefs, the heads of the tribes of Israel, shall gather themselves to you.

cnv.text: 如果單吹一枝，眾領袖，就是以色列的族長，都要到你那裡聚集。

ccb.text: 如果只吹响一支号，担任首领的以色列各族长要聚集到你那里。
